# fleetdm_software_titles (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about all FleetDM software titles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all software titles
data "fleetdm_software_titles" "all" {}

output "total_software_count" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_titles.all.total_count
}

output "software_names" {
  value = [for s in data.fleetdm_software_titles.all.software_titles : s.name]
}

# Filter software by team
data "fleetdm_software_titles" "team_software" {
  team_id = fleetdm_team.workstations.id
}

# Search for specific software
data "fleetdm_software_titles" "browsers" {
  query = "chrome"
}

output "browser_software" {
  value = [for s in data.fleetdm_software_titles.browsers.software_titles : {
    name   = s.name
    source = s.source
    hosts  = s.hosts_count
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `available_for_install` (Boolean) Only return software available for install.
- `query` (String) Search query to filter software titles by name.
- `team_id` (Number) Filter by team ID.
- `vulnerable_only` (Boolean) Only return software with known vulnerabilities.

### Read-Only

- `software_titles` (Attributes List) List of software titles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--software_titles))
- `total_count` (Number) Total count of software titles.

<a id="nestedatt--software_titles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `software_titles`

Read-Only:

- `bundle_identifier` (String) The bundle identifier (for macOS apps).
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the software.
- `hosts_count` (Number) The number of hosts with this software.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the software title.
- `name` (String) The name of the software.
- `source` (String) The source of the software.
- `versions_count` (Number) The number of versions of this software.
